title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at FM Logistic India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at FM Logistic India
jsonLd.description:
FM Logistic India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FM Logistic India:
FM Logistic India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FM Logistic India!
